content: For the next meetup I'm thinking Sunday, June 21st at 7pm. (I'm aware it's Father's Day.) At Time Out Market in the Fenway (map).
I can do the 14th but it's only two weeks away. Seems a bit too soon.
I can't do the 31st because I'll be out of town. If people really prefer that date, please feel free to meet without me!
I mean, we also went a long time between the previous meetup and the one before, so maybe a shorter gap to get back to ~ mid month meeting isnt a bad thing?
Oh? Are you arguing for the 14th? Only 8 days away but I'm ok with that.
i think any of them are fine with me
Let's ping some regulars like @Dan @Pete @Yamil Suarez @Dave Hanft @Tanmay Sharma to see if we can get another :thumbs_up: for Sunday, June 14th at 7pm.
14th I can't do. 21 should be fine. 28th is a maybe.
I can’t do 14th or 21 but 28 I think is good
